summary: Follow-up for graduating concept/synthesis content-quality scaffold from advisory to stronger gate

observations.problem: The new concept/synthesis substance scaffold is currently advisory-only, so future pages can still pass hard gates while missing Core model, Common misread, Key variables, Mechanism, Evidence ladder, Concrete examples, or Boundary.
observations.why_it_matters: The scaffold prevents child-route splits from becoming thin routing buckets; without a later graduation plan, the wiki can regress to taxonomy-heavy pages with weak reusable substance.
observations.automation_candidate: After one or two clean intake cycles, promote content_quality_scaffold_advisory into a stage2 eval or a scoped fail gate for newly created concept/synthesis pages, with exemptions for deliberate stubs.
observations.suggested_followup: Closed on 2026-05-26: removed the rollout-date floor and promoted the scaffold to a scoped stage2 eval for all wiki concept/synthesis pages while keeping lint advisory output for diagnostics.
